title: Get in touch
meta_description: Get in touch with Tonia Antoniazzi, MP for Gower.
text_excerpt: Get in touch TONIA ANTONIAZZI MP Home About Tonia News > Latest News Speeches PubAid Newsletter In Parliament How I Can Help Get in touch Advice Surgeries Wider Support Office Conduct My office is not currently open for casework drop-ins. Please get in touch by phone or email if you need assistance. Address: Ty Newydd Community Centre 17 West Street Gorseinon SA4 4AA Telephone: 01792 899 025 Email: [email protected] You can also attend a one of my regular advice surgeries which are open to all constituents. The following areas are devolved to the Welsh Parliament: Health, Housing, Local Government, Education, Economic Development, Transport, Rural Affairs, Arts, Sports and Culture . ​ If your query is related to one of these issues you can get in touch with your Senedd member, Rebecca Evans MS in the following ways. Telephone: 01792 899081 Email: [email protected] There are some issues which your local councillor will be best placed to address, such as waste collections, planning applications and potholes. You can find out who your local councillor is here: ​ Your Councillors - Swansea Useful Links Swansea Council Information on local services such as waste collection, schools, and planning. Wales TUC Advice and information about your rights at work and which trade union represents your sector. Swansea University Law Clinic Offering free legal advice on a range of issues. Citizens Advice Advice on a number of issues such and benefits, housing and immigration. They can also be contacted via their local advice line 0808 278 7926 Shelter Cymru Housing advice for renters and home owners. Privacy policy Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS Home About Tonia News > Latest News Speeches PubAid Newsletter In Parliament How I Can Help Get in touch Advice Surgeries Wider Support Office Conduct
